name: Short-Term AI Trade Analysis
description: Daily (5 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Pulls detected trade setups, gathers price data and Neo4j peer context, feeds to Short-Term Trading Analyst agent for full analysis with entry/stop/target/position sizing. Stores recommendations.

parameters.content:
## Short-Term AI Trade Analysis

Required: postgresApi, anthropicApi, neo4j
Uses: Short-Term Trading Analyst agent
Analyzes detected patterns with full risk assessment

parameters.query: SELECT a.ticker, a.alert_type, a.metadata, t.company_name, t.sector, t.industry, t.market_cap, w.metadata as wl_meta FROM alerts a JOIN tickers t ON a.ticker = t.ticker LEFT JOIN watchlists w ON a.ticker = w.ticker AND w.strategy = 'short_term' WHERE a.strategy = 'short_term' AND a.alert_type LIKE 'trade_setup_%' AND a.triggered_at::date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY (a.metadata->>'confidence')::int DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (c:Company {ticker:$ticker})-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]->(i:Industry)<-[:BELONGS_TO_INDUSTRY]-(peer:Company) WHERE peer.ticker <> $ticker OPTIONAL MATCH (peer)-[w:IN_WATCHLIST]->(wl:Watchlist) RETURN peer.ticker AS peer_ticker, peer.name AS peer_name, collect(DISTINCT wl.name) AS on_watchlists LIMIT 5

INSERT INTO investment_scores (ticker, strategy, score_date, overall_score, recommendation, thesis, created_at) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}', 'short_term', CURRENT_DATE, 7.0, 'WATCH', '{{$json.output}}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ticker, strategy, score_date) DO UPDATE SET thesis = EXCLUDED.thesis;
